rulings.Case Title: SUZANNE MEREDITH VS. 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 8, 2015, line 3. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint Continued to November 13, 2105. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than October 23, 2105 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
